---
name: Continuity issue
about: Report memory drift, hidden knowledge leakage, or long-session breakage
title: "[Continuity]: "
labels: continuity, gm behavior
assignees: ""
---

## What went wrong?

Describe the continuity problem.

Examples:

- an NPC knew something they should not know;
- an old NPC, item, promise, debt, or clue was forgotten;
- a major arc ended without reward or carry-forward;
- a scene contradicted established campaign memory.

## Campaign context

- Genre or setting type:
- Approximate session or turn length:
- Relevant campaign files, if any:

## What should RePoG have preserved?

Name the fact, relationship, secret, thread, reward, or consequence that should
have mattered.

## Example text

Paste a short excerpt if it is safe to share.

## Suggested fix

If you have an idea, describe whether this needs a workflow, template, example,
or helper-tool change.
